shortDescription: "__init__ must do something"
shortCorrection: "The body of __init__ can be empty"

    relation: Special case

    id: NoEmptyConstructor

   - id: plr3.8
     sections: ["3.3.1"]

references:

It is not okay for a class to have an ```__init__``` with an empty body.

frontmatter.shortCorrection: The body of __init__ can be empty
